title: Star Wars Manga
content:
{{Top|rwm|italics=1}}
[[File:Star_Wars_Manga.jpg|thumb|Tokyopop's ''Star Wars Manga''.]]
'''''Star Wars Manga''''' was a series of [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] manga style [[Star Wars comic books|comics]] adapting films from the ''[[Star Wars]]'' saga. The [[original trilogy]] and [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']] were adapted. [[Tokyopop]] also released two new manga books in the vein of ''[[Star Wars Tales]]''. In [[2009]], [[Take Shobo]] published two manga books based on [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|''The Clone Wars'' television series]]. 

==Media==
===Installments===
*''[[Star Wars Manga: A New Hope]]''
*''[[Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back]]''
*''[[Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi]]''
*''[[Star Wars Manga: The Phantom Menace]]''
*''[[Star Wars Manga: Black]]''
*''[[Star Wars Manga: Silver]]''
*''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Manga]]''
